name: MicroTaskX
description: An ultra-lightweight, high-performance modular micro-RTOS and multitasking framework featuring a template-driven priority scheduler, runtime task controls, macro-driven non-blocking timers, smart power management, and real-time CPU profiling.
keywords: multitasking, scheduler, task-manager, cpu-profiling, non-blocking, timing, fast-adc, ema-filter, micro-rtos, modular, low-power, smart-sleep
